description: Marriage contract. Dated: Sunday, 14 Tishrei 5557 AM = 16 October 1796 CE. Location: Cairo. Groom: David Gabbay b. Seʿadya. Bride: ביתו bt. Khalīfa Pinto. Currencies: real, medin. Witnesses: The same signature appears twice from the scribe Meʾīr b. Shalōm Ben-Naʿīm, who has also been appointed to sign on the groom's behalf. Given that this ketubba lacks a second witness signature, it represents an unfinalized draft. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
